text.title: Internal Link Rotation Schedule Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to set up and run the quarterly internal-link rotation.

step.name: confirm-graph-spec
step.action: Confirm graph spec exists and crawl_date is within 30 days. Otherwise re-run that methodology first.
step.decision-gate: graph spec missing or stale → exit to [[internal-linking-strategy-graph]].

step.name: assign-rotation-order
step.input: Cluster list + prior quarter retrospective (if any).
step.action: Fix the rotation order for the quarter. Slot every 14 days. Fill rotation_calendar with slot_n + scheduled_date + cluster_id. status='scheduled'.
step.decision-gate: Order changes mid-quarter forbidden. Rule r4.

step.name: run-60min-audit-per-slot
step.action: Time-box 60 min. Walk cluster: orphans, low-inbound spokes, anchor diversity, hub backlinks. Ship in-window fixes; defer the rest with 30-day SLA.

step.name: log-and-escalate-fixes
step.action: For each new deferred fix: set due_date = logged_at + 30d. For each existing fix past due_date and status='open': escalate to next rotation's first slot (status='escalated').

step.name: end-of-quarter-retrospective
step.input: All audit_log + deferred_fixes rows for the quarter.
step.action: Write 1-page retrospective. Cover: total fixes shipped vs deferred, SLA-miss count, recurring offender clusters, rotation-order adjustments for next quarter. Persist to retrospective block.
step.decision-gate: Retrospective absent at quarter close → block. Rule r6.
